---
title: "PRODIGY_DS_01"
author: "Ansh Bansal"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: word_document
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
```

```{r}
df = read.csv("C:/Users/anshb/Downloads/countries-table.csv")
View(df)
```

## 1. Bar Chart: Top 10 Countries by Population (2023)
```{r}
top_10 <- df %>% 
  arrange(desc(pop2023)) %>% 
  head(10)

ggplot(top_10, aes(x = reorder(country, pop2023), y = pop2023)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Top 10 Countries by Population (2023)",
       x = "Country",
       y = "Population") +
  theme_minimal()
```


## 2. Histogram: Distribution of Growth Rate
```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = growthRate)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "skyblue", color = "white") +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.2, fill = "blue") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Population Growth Rate",
       x = "Growth Rate",
       y = "Frequency") +
  theme_minimal()
```
